title: #2.13: You gotta choose the one with the powers you want
description: Butt lovin'! Lots and lots O' butt lovin'! Is not what Spækbrættet has in store for you today. Instead, Robin has chosen to deter us all from ever listening to another episode ever again. That was it, thanks for listening! Okay, okay. In all seriousness, we'll be told about Perianal Abscesses. See? I told you it was gross. We've also got questions from Reddit, and then Mark has yet another remedy for one of your ailments. How to stop snoring! Buy our merch!
